topEvents.headline: 3-vehicle collision, no injuries reported; tow requested, expect delays.

headlines.headline: 3-vehicle collision, no injuries reported; tow requested, expect delays.

properties.headline: 3-vehicle collision, no injuries reported; tow requested, expect delays.
properties.description: Three-vehicle traffic collision at the intersection. No injuries reported. Tow service (Affordable Tow) requested and en route. Emergency responders were notified; incident is being cleared. Expect lane obstructions and slow-moving traffic through the intersection while vehicles are removed.
